name: Recursive Dollhouse Smuggling
description: Manipulate synchronized miniature, human-scale, and giant copies of the same room so that objects transferred or moved at one scale alter obstacles at the others.
natural_language: Move the parcel through the nested rooms and deliver it at the correct scale. Manipulate the linked obstacle through a different projection, then carry the parcel collision-free through both physical scale frames into the giant bay.

metadata.variant_count_kind: projection matrices, mirror, palette, room offsets, scale views, and canonical drag routes
metadata.notes: All panels are invertible projections of one canonical collision world; portal transfers preserve canonical position and independently change only the parcel scale.
